/usr/bin/cc -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/game_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/game_tests.dir/tests/test_main.c.o CMakeFiles/game_tests.dir/tests/test_ai.c.o CMakeFiles/game_tests.dir/tests/test_arena.c.o CMakeFiles/game_tests.dir/tests/test_combat.c.o CMakeFiles/game_tests.dir/tests/test_engine.c.o CMakeFiles/game_tests.dir/tests/test_game.c.o -o game_tests  libgame_core.a /usr/lib64/libSDL3.so.0.4.0 -lm
